name: Ego-Robot
caption: The autonomous agent navigating the environment. It is currently positioned in the center of Room 0, equipped with a 360-degree LiDAR and panoramic vision system for real-time spatial reasoning.

name: chair
caption: A lightweight ergonomic chair with a black mesh backrest and silver metal legs, suitable for modern office environments and providing comfortable lumbar support.
instruction: Go to the lightweight ergonomic chair that features a black mesh backrest and silver metal legs.

name: table
caption: A rectangular wooden dining table with a polished oak surface and sturdy legs, appearing to be part of a formal dining set for four people.
instruction: Navigate to the rectangular wooden dining table with a polished oak surface and sturdy legs, designed for a formal set of four people.

name: cabinet
caption: A low-profile white storage cabinet with two sliding doors and metallic handles, used for organizing documents or household essentials efficiently.
instruction: Find the low-profile white storage cabinet equipped with two sliding doors and metallic handles.

name: screen
caption: A large flat-panel liquid crystal screen resting on a low stand, currently powered off with its black glass surface reflecting the room light.
instruction: Go to the large flat-panel liquid crystal screen resting on a low stand with a black reflective glass surface.

name: chair
caption: A blue fabric upholstered chair featuring a curved backrest and padded seat, offering a splash of color to the corner of the room.
instruction: Navigate to the blue fabric upholstered chair with a curved backrest and padded seat located in the corner of the room.
